name: trailing_commas_nested_object_array
description: Compact (space-free) commas around UNQUOTED NUMBER object values. BAML's fixing parser greedily consumes the comma after an unquoted value when the next byte is not a space/newline (json_parse_state.rs InObjectValue), so it reads inner.x as the string "1,\"y\":2," and ERRORS on int coercion. Native cannot reproduce that greedy scan, so it DECLINES (fallback) rather than claim a cleanly-parsed object — preserving parity with BAML's error. Pinned native disposition: fallback. want captured from BAML final parse (error).
